summary: Architect produced 67KB of substantive arch docs across 5 files. All 12 audit categories rated. Real findings backed by vault knowledge: P0 IsFreeLicense not wired to preflight; guest IP detection missing; root_disk_controller not persisted; boot_mode value mismatch (OVMF-Secure vs Secure). P1 multi-NIC zone capacity not validated; HealthCheckResult not persisted; Zone UEFI capability check missing. Average architect score 6.8/10 = real issues to fix. Approving for Phase 3 backend implementation.
